narrative:
Pataskala 4-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,178 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
